title: LASERS
description:
LASERS is a brutally hard multiplayer game about surviving deadly laser mazes. Only one player can win. Will it be you?Features• Dodge lasers or die trying. One wrong step will cost you your limbs

• Online multiplayer for 1-10 players

• Race against the clock to be the last player standing

• Over 20 purposefully tough handmade levels to beat

• Full of thick gym bros and girls to play as

• Unlock emotes and outfits by increasing your Halo Rank

• Dark, pounding synth music

This game was created for fun by a tiny indie studio. If you enjoy it, please show us your support and we'll continue to work on it!
description_short: LASERS is a brutally hard multiplayer game about surviving deadly laser mazes. Only one player can win. Will it be you?
